steps.title: Identify the one strongest clue: what we need
steps.content: The passage states “most had annual increases... but that trend wasn't universal.” This directly signals we need an example of a country that did not follow the universal pattern of increases.

steps.title: Match that requirement to the choices
steps.content: South Korea's revenue fell from \$21.0 billion in 2016 to \$17.2 billion in 2017, providing exactly that counterexample. The other three fail because A uses data outside the table, B is factually false (Japan grew from \$33.5B to \$45.3B), and D doesn't show any break from the upward trend. That matches choice C — C is correct.
